title: Timed Wither Storm
description: This datapack makes the wither storm spawn after an amount of time, instead of the normal house.
body: This datapack removes the hourse the witherstorm spawns at normaly, and instead makes it spawn after a set amount of in game time, far away from 0,0. You can change the timer length, pause the timer, or reset the timer using the trigger command: '/trigger WitherStormControls' while in creative mode, with operator privlage.
